message:
fix: throttle ACKs to 24fps to prevent Chrome flooding frames

When ACKing every frame immediately, Chrome sends at max rate (60fps+)
causing massive frame drops on video content.

Now we throttle ACKs to ~24fps while ensuring:
- First frame is ACKed immediately (to start stream)
- Pending ACK is always updated to latest frame (no drops)
- Pending ACK is flushed when viewer consumes a frame
- No ACK debt - pending ACKs are never discarded, just delayed
